name: Frosted Peanut Butter Cake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Remove wrappers from candies and chop into pieces.
3. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
4. In a small mixing bowl, beat together butter, peanut butter, sugar, and brown sugar until well blended.
5. Gradually add milk, eggs, and vanilla, beating until smooth and well blended.
6. Stir flour, baking soda, and salt; add to the butter mixture; beat until well blended.
7. Spread batter into prepared pan.
8. Bake 18 to 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
10. Spread Chocolate Peanut Butter Topping over cake and sprinkle candy pieces over top.
11. Cut into squares.
Chocolate Peanut Butter Topping:
1. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, combine chocolate chips, peanut butter, and butter.
2. Microwave at HIGH for 1 minute; stir.
3. If necessary, microwave at HIGH for an additional 15 seconds at a time, stirring after each addition, until the chips are melted when stirred.
4. Add powdered sugar; whisk until smooth and of spreading consistency.
